comment: I'm pretty Amazed by the changes, I was requesting for a feature that lets us Capture pic from the frames and export it and they actually did it. Thanks Google. Edit. Love the movie editing feature, just wish that it could let us decide the quality of the video when saving it. Great video but very low quality when. Being exported, I wish it could let us choose till 4k.
key sentence: Key words: Capture pic, export, movie editing feature, quality of the video
the function of activity: The activity involves searching for contacts, opening a menu, editing photos, playing videos, trimming and muting videos, stabilizing videos, exporting frames, changing tabs, cancelling operations, and saving edited copies.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Edit Vedio', 'description': 'Open the vedio editing tools'}, {'name': 'Play Video', 'description': 'Start playing a video'}, {'name': 'Trim Video', 'description': 'Trim the video from the start or end'}, {'name': 'Mute Video', 'description': 'Mute the audio of the video'}, {'name': 'Stabilize Video', 'description': 'Apply video stabilization'}, {'name': 'Export Frame', 'description': 'Export a frame from the video'}, {'name': 'Change Tab', 'description': 'Switch between different editing tabs (e.g., video, crop, adjust)'}, {'name': 'Cancel', 'description': 'Cancel the current editing operation'}, {'name': 'Save Copy', 'description': 'Save a copy of the edited photo or video'}]
